LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AREZOU SHADABADI'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. MS. SHADABADI HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED THAT SHE IS ENTITLED TO A CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. (CCP 703.080(B).) DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN WHY THE $101.50 CURRENTLY HELD BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE IS USED IN HER TRADE, BUSINESS OR PROFESSION. (CLAIM OF EXEMPTION 4.) THE SHERIFF SHALL RELEASE THE FUNDS CURRENTLY HELD TO PLAINTIFF. COURT TO PREPARE WRITTEN ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Genna DeLany Esq. 916-920-2295 of Nelson & Kennard for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Arezou Shadabadi 619-971-4474 for Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Defendant informs the Court of the negative balance on her bank account and that she cannot afford to pay $50 dollars. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

AREZOU SHADABADI'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Upheld/Granted. The Sheriff is ordered to return all monies being held to Claimant.(as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288, email:swong@sftc.org, Reported. (D302)

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos.
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AREZOU SHADABADI'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS Denied. Ms. Shadabadi has not demonstrated that she is entitled to a claim of exemption. (CCP 703.080(b).) Defendant has not shown why the $101.50 currently held by the sheriff's office is used in her trade, business or profession. (Claim of Exemption 4.) The Sheriff shall release the funds currently held to Plaintiff. COURT TO PREPARE WRITTEN ORDER. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
